items.example: I packed everything into one small suitcase.
A backpack is more practical than a suitcase for hiking.
Don't forget to check your passport expiry date before booking a flight.
Apply sunscreen every two hours when you're at the beach.
I took my binoculars to watch the birds on the lake.
You'll need a travel adaptor for charging your phone abroad.
It's wise to buy travel insurance before going on a trip.
Always keep a first-aid kit in your backpack.
I bought a guidebook to help me plan my route.
A phrase book can be useful when you don't speak the local language.
He packed his rucksack with camping gear.
We used a paper map because we didn't have internet access.
